Beaudefoin is looking for adventurers to help him with his Moonfire Faire duties.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Beaudefoin has asked you to fish up some fresh haddock. Catch three of them on the North Isle of Endless Summer and deliver them to him.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
